name: I Haven T Heard Back Yet And I Ve Been Swamped On A Few Projects So Not Today

thesis: I Haven T Heard Back Yet And I Ve Been Swamped On A Few Projects So Not Today turns "I haven’t heard back yet and I’ve been swamped on a few projects so not today" into a working product. Target users get a focused tool that solves the core job on day one, with a clear path from prototype to production.
